name: npm-safety-guard
description: Detects malicious npm packages & CVE vulnerabilities before installation. Covers supply chain attacks (Axios 1.14.1 / DPRK RAT), GlassWorm, event-stream and more. By SendWaveHub.

commands.title: NPM Safety Guard: Scan package.json Now
NPM Safety Guard: Show Security Report
NPM Safety Guard: Check ReversingLabs (CVE + Malware)

npmSafetyGuard.enableAutoScan.description: Automatically scan package.json on open and save

npmSafetyGuard.showInlineDecorations.description: Show inline warning decorations in package.json

npmSafetyGuard.rlToken.description: ReversingLabs Spectra Assure Community API token. Get free token at https://secure.software (sign in → profile → create token). Enables real-time CVE and malware detection beyond the built-in static database.
